title: Create: Aloft
description: An engineering-first Modpack built around Create Aeronautics.
body:
# Create: Aloft

> *Four factions. One sky. No shortcuts.*

**Create: Aloft** is the official modpack for the [Create: Aloft SMP](https://createaloft.net) — a small, friendly server built around Create and its Aeronautics addon. The pack is designed for slow-burn engineering, cosy building, and the moment four isolated worlds finally connect into one.

You can play it solo, but it really shines on the server.

---

## Singleplayer

You can absolutely play this pack on your own. The faction system is server-driven, but if you want to build and play without it in singleplayer, run:

/aloft phase gates_open
